name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon, the White Phantom Beast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>青眼の白龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブルーアイズ・ホワイト・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card; negate that effect. You can only use each of the following effects of "Blue-Eyes White Dragon, the White Phantom Beast" once per turn. When this card is added from the Deck to your hand, or your monster is destroyed by battle: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon it. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand or Deck: You can destroy all monsters your opponent controls, also you cannot attack directly for the rest of this turn, except with "Blue-Eyes" monsters.
mnst_eff: When a card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card; negate that effect. You can only use each of the following effects of "Blue-Eyes White Dragon, the White Phantom Beast" once per turn. When this card is added from the Deck to your hand, or your monster is destroyed by battle: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon it. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand or Deck: You can destroy all monsters your opponent controls, also you cannot attack directly for the rest of this turn, except with "Blue-Eyes" monsters.
eff: When a card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field (Quick Effect): You can discard 1 card; negate that effect. You can only use each of the following effects of "Blue-Eyes White Dragon, the White Phantom Beast" once per turn. When this card is added from the Deck to your hand, or your monster is destroyed by battle: You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon it. If this card is Special Summoned from the hand or Deck: You can destroy all monsters your opponent controls, also you cannot attack directly for the rest of this turn, except with "Blue-Eyes" monsters.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Activates if added to the hand
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
